items.headline: Arsenal and Man City's final Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
items.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

items.headline: Zalmi demolish Gladiators after Babar 100, Mendis 83
items.description: Zalmi won by 118 runs are now virtually guaranteed of a place in the top two

items.headline: Bryson DeChambeau withdraws from LIV event with wrist injury
items.description: Bryson DeChambeau withdrew from the final round of LIV Golf Mexico City on Sunday, citing an injury to his wrist that he did not want to further aggravate.

items.headline: Inside the improbable Giants-Bengals Dexter Lawrence trade
items.description: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.
items.byline: Jordan Raanan, Jeremy Fowler and Ben Baby

items.headline: Another James Rew fifty puts Somerset on course to beat Hampshire
items.description: Lewis Gregory took his first five-wicket haul in three years to restrict Hampshire, despite fifties to Nick Gubbins, Jake Lehmann and Ben Brown
items.byline: ECB Reporters Network supported by Rothesay

items.headline: Varun points to slow Kolkata pitch for his match-winning return
items.description: KKR spinner says spinners will always go for runs when there is nothing in the surface to help them

items.headline: The Maharaj hand in South Africa Women's spin success
items.description: With the men's team on a winter break, the left-arm spinner has worked on the women's team's backroom staff, with excellent results

items.headline: Erling Haaland gives Man City crucial win over Arsenal in Premier League title race
items.description: Erling Haaland helped Manchester City land a telling blow in the Premier League title race as his goal gave Manchester City a crucial 2-1 win over Arsenal.

items.headline: Man City vs. Arsenal LIVE: Haaland winner swings Premier League title race
items.description: The Premier League title race takes centre stage this afternoon as Manchester City host Arsenal in a game that could a long way to deciding where the trophy ends up in May, and you can follow it all with ESPN.

items.headline: Rayan Cherki, Erling Haaland give Man City advantage over Arsenal in Premier League title race
items.description: Erling Haaland's second-half winner gave Manchester City a huge boost in the Premier League title race on Sunday afternoon as Pep Guardiola's side beat Arsenal 2-1 at the Etihad.

items.headline: Premier League recap: Haaland wins it for Man City vs. Arsenal in key title clash
items.description: Manchester City defeated Arsenal 2-1 in a huge clash that could swing the entire Premier League title race, on a Sunday full of matches.

items.headline: Royals' Salvator Perez, manager clear air about 'mental breather'
items.description: Salvador Perez and Royals manager Matt Quatraro said they were back on the same page Sunday after the catcher's social media post on Saturday generated drama.

items.headline: NFL draft prospect Zachariah Branch arrested in Georgia
items.description: Wide receiver Zachariah Branch, who is widely expected to be a Day 2 NFL draft pick, was arrested early Sunday morning in Athens, Georgia, on two possible misdemeanor charges.

items.headline: Van Dijk hands Liverpool a UCL boost and reason to believe, after more late drama
items.description: Liverpool beat Everton 2-1 with a 100th-minute winner to go seven points clear of Chelsea in the race for the Champions League. And how they needed it.

items.headline: Vitor Pereira backs Morgan Gibbs-White for England recall after hat trick
items.description: Vitor Pereira feels Morgan Gibbs-White deserves an England recall after his 15-minute hat trick fired Nottingham Forest closer to Premier League safety.
